title: Changed additions
description: Adds extra content to the Changed Mod by LtxProgrammer but keeping a Vanilla style
body:
---

# 🧬 Changed Additions

This mod takes the Changed universe to the next level, offering more possibilities, enhanced control, and some transformations stats and effects! ✨

## What does it add?

### 🔁 Untransfur Features

You can switch back to your human form without any dramatic exits!
Even with the `keepform` flag on, you can revert — no need for tearful goodbyes.

### 👁️ TransfurVisions

Create your own custom transformation visions using datapacks!
Simply drop a datapack with an `.json` file containing the transformation ID and your desired post-effect path into your world, and voilà — your transformation now has its own unique vision of the world!
*This feature draws inspiration from the Origins Mod.*

---

## 💡 Mod Focus — What’s the scoop?

> **Changed Additions is all about giving players more ways to customize their experience while keeping that classic vanilla vibe and steering clear of overly complicated mechanics.**

---

## 🧠 Cool-to-know Info (a.k.a. the good stuff):

* 🧩 It works great with Changed Addon Plus!
Just a heads up: using both might feel a bit redundant since they have different goals and styles.

* 🧪 This mod is still in **ALPHA / WIP** — expect some bugs!
If you encounter anything odd or downright bizarre, please let us know. We’re on it!

* ✨ Some features from Changed Addon Plus will also be part of this project — plus a bunch of exciting new ones are on the horizon!

* 🎁 Changed Addon Plus Donors:
Your perks (like selected features, custom items, OC transformations, etc.) are still intact!
To incorporate them here, we might need to make a few light adjustments to align with the tone and direction of Changed Additions.

---

🔧 This is a work in progress — crafted by fans, for fans!
Join in on the development fun, share your ideas, report any bugs, and help us make this mod truly amazing 💙

---
